## Type of Change
Please select the type of change this PR represents:
- [ ] **🐛 Bug Fix** (patch) - Fixes an issue without changing existing functionality
- [ ] **✨ Feature** (minor) - Adds new functionality in a backward-compatible manner
- [ ] **💥 Breaking Change** (major) - Changes that could break existing functionality
- [ ] **📚 Documentation** (patch) - Updates to documentation only
- [ ] **🔧 Maintenance** (patch) - Code refactoring, dependency updates, or tooling changes
- [ ] **🚨 Hotfix** (patch) - Critical fixes that need immediate attention

**Review Guidelines for Maintainers:**
- Ensure appropriate labels are added (patch/minor/major)
- Verify all checklist items are completed
- Check test coverage is adequate
- Validate security considerations
- Confirm documentation is updated
- Test the changes in a staging environment
